subject: New Opening: Infrastructure Engineer – Go
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

FlexTel (telecom/media) is looking for a senior Infrastructure Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: ASAP
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 1050 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • Go
  • AWS
  • Kubernetes
  • Oracle

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
